revision.comment: 「[[Template:Official website]]」の保護レベルを変更しました: [[Wikipedia:保護の方針#半永久的な保護]]「[[Wikipedia:影響が特に大きいテンプレート|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]]」に基づき無期限拡張半保護 ([編集=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限) [移動=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限))
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Official website|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: add format and mobile to unsupported
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Official website|main}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|showblankpositional=1|unknown={{main other|1=[[Category:Pages using Official website with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Official website]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|1|2|URL|url|name}}</includeonly><!--
--><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
